items.headline: Indian Markets Expected to Open Mixed to Positive Amid Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: Indian equity markets are anticipated to open with a mixed to positive bias despite renewed geopolitical tensions between the US and Iran, causing crude oil prices to inch up. A strengthening Indian rupee and easing geopolitical concerns elsewhere offer support.

items.headline: Global Markets Mixed; US Tech Sell-off and Asia Negative on US-Iran Conflict
items.summary: Global markets presented a mixed picture, with US markets closing lower on Friday due to a sell-off in technology stocks. Most Asian markets opened negatively in response to the escalated US-Iran conflict.

items.headline: FIIs and DIIs Remain Net Buyers in Indian Equities
items.summary: Foreign Institutional Investors (FIIs) were net buyers of shares worth Rs 383.76 crore on June 25, 2026, while Domestic Institutional Investors (DIIs) were significant net buyers, purchasing shares worth Rs 5,747.75 crore.

items.headline: RBI Maintains Repo Rate at 5.25% with 'Neutral' Stance
items.summary: The Reserve Bank of India's (RBI) Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) unanimously decided to maintain the repo rate at 5.25% in its June 2026 meeting, retaining a 'Neutral' stance.

items.headline: RBI Issues Revised Framework for Upper Layer NBFCs
items.summary: The RBI issued a revised framework for identifying Upper Layer Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFC-ULs), automatically classifying NBFCs with an asset size of Rs 1 lakh crore or more as NBFC-ULs, effective June 24, 2026.

items.headline: Retail Inflation Rises to 3.9% in May, a 16-Month High
items.summary: Retail inflation, as measured by the Consumer Price Index (CPI), rose to 3.9% in May, a 16-month high, primarily driven by increased food prices, bringing it closer to the RBI's target of 4%.

items.headline: Goldman Sachs Lowers India's Retail Inflation Projection for 2026
items.summary: Goldman Sachs has lowered India's retail inflation projection for Calendar Year 2026 to 4.4%.

items.headline: Goldman Sachs Raises India's Real GDP Growth Forecast for 2026 to 6.8%
items.summary: Goldman Sachs has raised India's real GDP growth forecast for Calendar Year 2026 to 6.8%.

items.headline: ADB Approves $42.2 Million Facility for India's Bamboo Industry
items.summary: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) approved a USD 42.2 million facility to support India's bamboo industry.

items.headline: Amazon Announces Significant $48 Billion Investment in India
items.summary: Amazon announced a significant investment of USD 48 billion in India, including USD 13 billion for AI and cloud infrastructure.

items.headline: Shreeram Proteins and A2Z Infra Engineering to Announce Q4 Results
items.summary: Companies such as Shreeram Proteins and A2Z Infra Engineering are scheduled to announce their audited financial results today, June 29, 2026.

items.headline: Banking and Auto Stocks Outperform, IT and Metals Underperform Last Week
items.summary: In the previous trading week, banking and auto stocks were key performers, while the IT and metals sectors experienced underperformance.

items.headline: Transport, Glass, and Aviation Sectors See Highest Market Cap Increase on Friday
items.summary: On Friday, the transport sector saw the highest increase in market capitalization, followed by the glass and aviation sectors, while the silver sector recorded a decline.

items.headline: Buying Interest in Auto and Realty, Selling Pressure in Metal and Oil & Gas on Thursday
items.summary: On Thursday, buying interest was observed in the auto and realty sectors, whereas metal and oil & gas sectors faced selling pressure.

items.headline: IRFC OFS Successfully Raises ₹2,084 Crore, Government Exercises Greenshoe Option
items.summary: The Indian Railway Finance Corporation (IRFC) OFS successfully raised ₹2,084 crore, with the government exercising the greenshoe option due to robust investor demand.

items.headline: Persistent Systems to Acquire Nagarro SE to Form AI-led Digital Engineering Company
items.summary: Persistent Systems is slated to acquire Nagarro SE at EUR 81 per share, which will form the Persistent-Nagarro Group, an AI-led digital engineering company valued at $2.9 billion.

items.headline: HCL Technologies Finalizes ₹1,427.25 Crore Investment in Axonwise Private Limited (Sarvam AI)
items.summary: HCL Technologies has finalized its ₹1,427.25 crore investment in Axonwise Private Limited (Sarvam AI).

items.headline: Several Companies Trading Ex-Dividend Today
items.summary: Several companies are trading ex-dividend today, including Jyothy Labs (₹3.50/share), Kansai Nerolac Paints (₹2.50/share), Kalpataru Projects International (₹11/share), and Raymond Lifestyle (₹1/share).

items.headline: Kajaria Ceramics and Patel Integrated Logistics Undertaking Share Buybacks
items.summary: Kajaria Ceramics and Patel Integrated Logistics are undertaking share buybacks.

items.headline: HDFC Bank Legal Review Finds No Evidence for Allegations
items.summary: An independent legal review found no evidence to substantiate allegations made by a former chairman against HDFC Bank.

items.headline: Aurobindo Pharma Faces Two USFDA Observations for Subsidiary Auroactive Pharma
items.summary: The USFDA concluded its inspection of Aurobindo Pharma's subsidiary, Auroactive Pharma, with two observations.

items.headline: Max Healthcare Institute, TVS Motor, Astra Microwave, Welspun Corp, Poonawalla Fincorp Highlighted for Bullish Momentum
items.summary: Max Healthcare Institute, TVS Motor Company, Astra Microwave Products, Welspun Corp, and Poonawalla Fincorp are being highlighted for their bullish momentum and potential breakouts.

items.headline: Motilal Oswal Recommends Buy for Gokaldas Exports and Reliance Industries
items.summary: Gokaldas Exports and Reliance Industries are recommended as 'buy' for the week by Motilal Oswal.

items.headline: Morepen Laboratories, UCO Bank, NHPC Recommended as Buy Under ₹100
items.summary: Morepen Laboratories, UCO Bank, and NHPC are recommended as 'buy' stocks under ₹100.

streetRecommendations.name: Gokaldas Exports
streetRecommendations.rationale: Recommended as a 'buy' for the week with strong upside potential.

streetRecommendations.name: Reliance Industries
streetRecommendations.rationale: Recommended as a 'buy' for the week with strong upside potential.

streetRecommendations.rationale: Specific technical buy call, recommended under ₹100.

streetRecommendations.rationale: Specific technical buy call, recommended under ₹100.
